name: sprocket-blog
description: A blog built with Next.js and Strapi
author: Jesse Clark

scripts.frontend: yarn clear && cd frontend && yarn dev
scripts.backend: yarn clear && cd backend && yarn develop
scripts.backend:db:export: cd backend && yarn strapi export --no-encrypt && cp export_*.tar.gz ./database/seed && mv ./database/seed/export_*.tar.gz ./database/seed/seed-data-latest.tar.gz && mv export_*.tar.gz ./database/backups/
scripts.setup: yarn install && yarn frontend:setup && yarn backend:setup
scripts.start: yarn clear && cd backend && yarn develop
scripts.repo:upstream: git fetch upstream && git merge upstream/main
